prose:
Frontier-orbital calculation on benzene (12 atoms: 6 C + 6 H) at the DFT level, tier 'standard' → B3LYP/def2-TZVP (PySCF RKS), gas phase, charge 0, multiplicity 1, exact four-centre two-electron integrals (no density fitting / RI approximation). Geometry taken as-is from the user-supplied .xyz (single-point, not re-optimised at this level). SCF converged in 8 cycles. No warnings reported. Integrity status: ok, trustworthy: true, all checks passed.

Key results:
  HOMO energy   = −7.0468329 eV  (orbital index 20; degenerate e₁g π pair with HOMO−1 = −7.0473344 eV)
  LUMO energy   = −0.41574728 eV (orbital index 21; degenerate e₂u π* pair with LUMO+1 = −0.41513054 eV)
  HOMO–LUMO gap = 6.6310857 eV  ← headline value

Koopmans descriptors: vertical IP = 7.0468329 eV, vertical EA = 0.41574728 eV, chemical hardness η = 3.3155428 eV, electronegativity χ = 3.7312901 eV, electrophilicity ω = 2.0995847 eV.

Output JSON: benzene_frontier_dft_standard.json
CLI: cli.py frontier benzene.xyz --method dft --tier standard --functional b3lyp --basis def2-tzvp --charge 0 --mult 1
